prompt:
You are the Helper in a household task. You will be given a complete, chronological event log -- including things one character did not personally witness. Reason about what that character actually knows, then answer using only the required JSON format.

Event log:
1. While standing in the workshop, Nadia places the wrench set into the plastic tote.
2. Nadia walks off toward the garage.
3. Separately, someone tidies the storage bin in the garage, moving the paint roller into the bookshelf cubby.
4. Meanwhile, the wrench set is taken out of the plastic tote in the workshop and placed in the backpack in the hallway closet.
5. Nadia is told, while still in the garage, that the wrench set has been moved to the backpack in the hallway closet.

Nadia is about to go looking for the wrench set and will check exactly one location first. Place a helpful marker at the location where Nadia will look FIRST -- based on what Nadia personally knows, not necessarily where the wrench set actually is right now.

Valid locations: garage, workshop, hallway closet

Respond with ONLY a JSON object of the form {"assist_location": "<one of the valid locations>"}. No other text, no explanation.
